build.beforeBuildCommand: bun run build:renderer && bun run build:sidecar

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ws://127.0.0.1:* ipc: http://ipc.localhost; frame-src 'self' data: http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* https://localhost:*
